task_completion.description: Verify the channel source is configured as a TCP Listener on port 6661.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the NextGen Connect 'Source' tab for 'HL7_Message_Router', the Connector Type should be 'TCP Listener' and the Local Port should be '6661'.

task_completion.description: Verify the ADT destination is configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Destinations' tab, there should be a destination named 'ADT_Destination' of type 'File Writer' with the Directory set to '/tmp/output/adt/' and a unique File Name (e.g., '${message.messageId}.hl7').

task_completion.description: Verify the ORM destination is configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Destinations' tab, there should be a destination named 'ORM_Destination' of type 'File Writer' with the Directory set to '/tmp/output/orm/' and a unique File Name.

task_completion.description: Verify the ORU destination is configured correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Destinations' tab, there should be a destination named 'ORU_Destination' of type 'File Writer' with the Directory set to '/tmp/output/oru/' and a unique File Name.

task_completion.description: Verify that routing filters are configured for the destinations based on message type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Filters' view for the destinations, there should be rules checking the MSH-9.1 field (e.g., msg['MSH']['MSH.9']['MSH.9.1'].toString() == 'ADT', 'ORM', or 'ORU') corresponding to each destination.

task_completion.description: Verify the channel is deployed and running.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the NextGen Connect 'Dashboard' view, the channel 'HL7_Message_Router' should be listed with a Status of 'STARTED'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the NextGen Connect Administrator GUI to configure the channel.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the NextGen Connect Administrator Java application interface being interacted with, rather than terminal commands editing XML configuration files directly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not manually create the output files to bypass the routing engine.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should not be seen using 'touch' or 'echo' commands in the terminal to create .hl7 files in the /tmp/output/ directories.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually entered the filter logic in the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Filter editor in NextGen Connect with actual rule logic (JavaScript or Rule Builder) rather than leaving the filters blank.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Channel Name: HL7_Message_Router. Listen Port: 6661. ADT Output Directory: /tmp/output/adt. ORM Output Directory: /tmp/output/orm. ORU Output Directory: /tmp/output/oru.
